mapper.sql: id, group_id, source_table, target_table, priority, fetch_sql, delete_where, start_id, end_id, step_count, step_rounds, pause_ms, enable_clean, enable_write, enable_status, id_column, created_time, updated_time, creator_id, updater_id, deleted
mapper.update:
UPDATE ea_archive_group_item_by_id
source_table = #{sourceTable}, target_table = #{targetTable}, priority = #{priority}, fetch_sql = #{fetchSql}, delete_where = #{deleteWhere}, start_id = #{startId}, end_id = #{endId}, step_count = #{stepCount}, step_rounds = #{stepRounds}, pause_ms = #{pauseMs}, enable_clean = #{enableClean}, enable_write = #{enableWrite}, enable_status = #{enableStatus}, id_column = #{idColumn}, updater_id = #{updaterId}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{id} AND group_id = #{groupId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE ea_archive_group_item_by_id SET enable_status = #{enableStatus}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND group_id = #{groupId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE ea_archive_group_item_by_id SET deleted = id, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND group_id = #{groupId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ea_archive_group_item_by_id WHERE id = #{id} AND group_id = #{groupId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ea_archive_group_item_by_id WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ea_archive_group_item_by_id WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND enable_status = 0 AND deleted = 0
